name: karma-tipping-agent
description: Orchestrate Karma's community pool tipping agent and event monitoring
author: Karma Omnichain Agent

actions.name: create_pool
actions.description: Creates a new community tipping pool with a specific target and smart split configuration

actions.name: deposit_to_pool
actions.description: Simulates a deposit into a community pool for tipping

actions.name: trigger_tip
actions.description: Force triggers a tip evaluation for a specific Rumble creator from a designated pool

actions.name: get_pool_stats
actions.description: Retrieves the total balance and tips distributed from a community pool

actions.name: add_creator_rule
actions.description: Adds a Rumble channel to be actively monitored for milestones and HTMX wallet extraction

actions.name: get_tip_history
actions.description: Retrieves the latest on-chain transaction history
